statusPolicy.collectedRequires: verified base Prosthetic Tool weapon inventory record
statusPolicy.missingRequires: verified absence of base Prosthetic Tool weapon inventory record in USER_DATA000
statusPolicy.details: Base Prosthetic Tools are detected from EquipParamWeapon row IDs stored as weapon inventory records. Source items from EquipParamGoods are documented for mapping provenance, but source item presence is not required because prosthetic source materials can be consumed when fitted.

sourceLocation.location: Outskirts Wall - Gate Path Idol, corpse inside a building near the idol
sourceLocation.acquisition: Loot Shuriken Wheel from the corpse, then fit it with the Sculptor as Loaded Shuriken.
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Reach Ashina Outskirts and the Outskirts Wall - Gate Path Idol.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Shuriken Wheel
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Shuriken Wheel at Outskirts Wall - Gate Path Idol, looted from a corpse in a nearby building.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 70000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

sourceLocation.location: Crow's Bed Memorial Mob, cliffs between Outskirts Wall - Gate Path and Outskirts Wall - Stairway
sourceLocation.acquisition: Purchase Robert's Firecrackers from Crow's Bed Memorial Mob, then fit them with the Sculptor as Shinobi Firecracker.
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Reach Ashina Outskirts and grapple to the Memorial Mob cliff. Battlefield Memorial Mob can also sell this item if missed.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Robert's Firecrackers
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Robert's Firecrackers as sold by Crow's Bed Memorial Mob between the Outskirts Wall idols, with a later Battlefield Memorial Mob backup.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 71000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

sourceLocation.location: Estate Path, campfire surrounded by enemies
sourceLocation.acquisition: Loot Flame Barrel from the campfire, then fit it with the Sculptor as Flame Vent.
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Access Hirata Estate with the Young Lord's Bell Charm and reach Estate Path.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Flame Barrel
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Flame Barrel in Hirata Estate from the Estate Path Idol, inside a campfire surrounded by enemies.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 72000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

sourceLocation.location: Estate Path courtyard, small garden house near two eavesdroppable guards
sourceLocation.acquisition: Loot Shinobi Axe of the Monkey from the small garden house, then fit it with the Sculptor as Loaded Axe.
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Access Hirata Estate and proceed past the Estate Path area.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Shinobi Axe of the Monkey
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Shinobi Axe of the Monkey in Hirata Estate, inside the small garden house by two guards discussing burning a temple.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 73000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

sourceLocation.location: Bamboo Thicket Slope hidden temple / pagoda path
sourceLocation.acquisition: Loot Mist Raven's Feathers from the hidden temple, then fit them with the Sculptor as Mist Raven.
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Access Hirata Estate, reach Bamboo Thicket Slope, and follow the hidden water/bamboo path to the temple.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Mist Raven's Feathers
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Mist Raven's Feathers inside a hidden temple reached through the water and bamboo path, guarded by an enemy.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 74000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

sourceLocation.location: Upper Tower - Antechamber, lower room chest after dropping through the floor opening
sourceLocation.acquisition: Loot Sabimaru from the chest, then fit it with the Sculptor as Sabimaru.
sourceLocation.chest: Chest in the lower Antechamber room
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Reach Ashina Castle and the Upper Tower - Antechamber Idol.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Sabimaru
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Sabimaru in Ashina Castle from Upper Tower - Antechamber, looted from a chest after dropping through the floor opening.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 75000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

sourceLocation.location: Old Grave area, building below the Old Grave Idol
sourceLocation.acquisition: Purchase Iron Fortress from Blackhat Badger, then fit it with the Sculptor as Loaded Umbrella.
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Reach Ashina Castle and the Old Grave Idol area. If Blackhat Badger has moved late-game, the item may appear where he originally sold it.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Iron Fortress
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Iron Fortress sold by Blackhat Badger for sen in a building near the Old Grave Idol in Ashina Castle.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 76000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

sourceLocation.location: Gun Fort, Long-arm Centipede Giraffe room, Buddha statue
sourceLocation.acquisition: Defeat Long-arm Centipede Giraffe and loot Large Fan from the Buddha statue, then fit it with the Sculptor as Divine Abduction.
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Reach Sunken Valley Gun Fort and defeat Long-arm Centipede Giraffe.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Large Fan
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Large Fan in Sunken Valley after defeating Long-arm Centipede Giraffe, at the Buddha statue in the room.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 77000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

sourceLocation.location: Gatehouse near Moon-View Tower, chest inside the locked building
sourceLocation.acquisition: Use the Gatehouse Key to open the gatehouse and loot Gyoubu's Broken Horn from the chest, then fit it with the Sculptor as Loaded Spear.
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Reach Ashina Castle, obtain the Gatehouse Key from soldiers near the bridge, then return to the Ashina Reservoir gatehouse.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Gyoubu's Broken Horn
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Gyoubu's Broken Horn inside the locked Ashina Reservoir gatehouse chest, opened with the Gatehouse Key from the bridge near Ashina Castle.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 78000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

sourceLocation.acquisition: Defeat Guardian Ape to obtain Slender Finger, then fit it with the Sculptor as Finger Whistle.
sourceLocation.requiredProgression: Reach Sunken Valley Passage and defeat Guardian Ape.

sourceReferences.label: Fextralife Slender Finger
sourceReferences.evidence: Lists Slender Finger as dropped by the Guardian Ape boss upon defeat.

evidence.details: A weapon inventory record with item ID 79000 and quantity 1 means this base Prosthetic Tool is present.

unresolved.details: Only the ten base Prosthetic Tools are mapped. Prosthetic upgrades are present in EquipParamWeapon but are not yet modeled.
Source item pickup flags for raw prosthetic materials are not required for base tool ownership and have not been mapped yet.
